CVE-2023-39804.title: In GNU tar before 1.35, mishandled extension attributes in a PAX  ...
CVE-2023-39804.description: In GNU tar before 1.35, mishandled extension attributes in a PAX archive can lead to an application crash in xheader.c.

CVE-2026-5704.title: A flaw was found in tar. A remote attacker could exploit this vul ...
CVE-2026-5704.description: A flaw was found in tar. A remote attacker could exploit this vulnerability by crafting a malicious archive, leading to hidden file injection with fully attacker-controlled content. This bypasses pre-extraction inspection mechanisms, potentially allowing an attacker to introduce malicious files onto a system without detection.
